hooks.command: bash -lc 'for root in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/avila-tek-skill-pack" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/avila-tek-skill-pack@avila-tek" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplace/avila-tek-skill-pack"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then bash "$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; exit $?; fi; done; candidate=$(find "$HOME/.claude/plugins" -maxdepth 4 -type f -name "session-start.sh" -path "*/avila-tek*" 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$candidate" ]; then bash "$candidate"; exit $?; fi; echo "{\"priority\":\"IMPORTANT\",\"message\":\"\u26a0\ufe0f avila-tek-skill-pack: session-start.sh not found. CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=[${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-NOT SET}]\"}"'

SessionStart.description: Load stack standards and agent-skills meta-skill for the current project
